title: 你会做饭吗？
description_uz: «Senga yordam kerakmi?» — ikki do'stning birga ovqat pishirish, sabzavot va ziravorlar haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog yordam taklif qilish, ko'rsatma berish va vaqtni aniqlashni mashq qiladi. Iliq mavzu va oshxonada kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Takrorlab o'rganib, ravon gapirishga o'tish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Тебе помочь?» — разговор двух друзей о совместной готовке, овощах и приправах. Этот диалог отрабатывает, как предложить помощь, дать указания и уточнить время. Тёплая тема и полезные слова для кухни. Отлично подходит для шэдоуинга и перехода к беглой речи.
description_en: «Do you need a hand?» — two friends chatting about cooking together, the vegetables, and the seasonings. This dialogue practises offering help, giving instructions, and checking how long things take. A warm topic with words you'll need in the kitchen. Perfect for shadowing your way toward fluent speech.

sentences.pinyin: Wǎn shang hǎo! Nǐ zài zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Good evening! What are you doing?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xū yào wǒ bāng máng ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a, bāng wǒ xǐ cài hé qiē cài.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi, sabzavotlarni yuvishga va to'g'rashga yordam ber.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай, помоги помыть и порезать овощи.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, help me wash and cut the vegetables.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ, yào qiē shén me?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Qiē yì xiē cōng, jiāng hé suàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz ko'k piyoz, zanjabil va sarimsoq to'g'ra.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нарежь немного лука, имбиря и чеснока.
sentences.text_translation_en: Cut some scallions, ginger, and garlic.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hái xū yào bié de cài ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you need any other dishes?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng le, liǎng gè cài gòu le.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need, two dishes are enough.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ ná wǎn hé kuài zi ba.
sentences.text_translation: Unda men kosa va choptayoqlarni olib kelaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда я принесу миски и палочки.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll get the bowls and chopsticks.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢，饭也好了。你快尝尝。
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie, fàn yě hǎo le. Nǐ kuài cháng chang.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat, ovqat ham tayyor bo'ldi. Tezroq totib ko'r.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо, и еда готова. Скорее попробуй.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks, the food's ready too. Hurry and taste it.
sentences.speaker: B
